hero.question: Spread: Celtics (-17.5)
hero.prob_take: At 52.5%, the market is pricing near a coin flip on a 17.5-point spread, which means sharps aren't confident either the Celtics dominate or this stays competitive. The 47.5-point swing in 24 hours suggests late money is fleeing YES, so watch for injury reports or Vegas line movement to validate whether the crowd is right to bail.

daily_take.headline: Celtics Blowout Bet Is Overheating. Sharp Money Should Fade.
daily_take.deck: The Celtics at minus-17.5 just ripped 47.5 points in 24 hours to 52.5%, riding public money chasing a historically dominant team. But blowout spreads this wide rarely hold. The market is pricing perfection when variance always shows up in the playoffs. Wise move: wait for this to drift back above 55% and take the underdog.
